Content Guide Back to guide

Voice

Our voice and positioning

The key to Justpoint's tone is knowing that we speak as two different brands: a consumer protection company and a law firm. Both share the name and founders, but each approaches the work differently. Think of them as siblings: raised in the same house and shaped by the same values, yet each following their own path.

Justpoint Inc. looks at the world through the lens of a scientist, using technology to uncover the truth about hidden toxins. Its work is driven by a belief that people deserve transparency about what's in the products they use every day.

Justpoint PLLC transforms those findings into legal action. Acting as a dedicated advocate, the firm champions the rights of people harmed by dangerous products, helping them secure the support they need to rebuild their lives.

Together, they are united by a shared commitment to fairness and protection.

Naming and Positioning Reference Guide

Justpoint Inc. Justpoint PLLC
PositioningConsumer protection companyLaw firm
FocusDetecting hidden toxins to stop the harm they causeLitigating mass tort claims for people affected by unsafe products
FoundationAI and scienceLegal excellence
PersonaScientistLawyer
QualitiesData intelligence, vigilance, commitmentPrecision, empathy, efficiency
VisionA healthier life for everyoneJustice for people affected by harmful products
VoicePurposeful, credible, approachableProfessional, supportive, trustworthy
Websitejustpoint.comjustpointlaw.com
Brand name Justpoint Justpoint
⚠️ While "Justpoint Law" is acceptable for internal use when referring to Justpoint PLLC, this name shouldn't be used for external communication.

Justpoint Inc. Voice

Purposeful

Our language reflects our mission-driven approach and the goal of protecting public health.

  • Use direct language that avoids filler, fluff, and vague claims.
  • Focus on the broader mission rather than individual outcomes.
  • Avoid overly emotional language.
Do
Exposing threats. Protecting people.

With AI and science, we detect dangerous products to stop the harm they cause.

Don't
Protecting you and your loved ones from deadly toxins

With breakthrough AI, we are transforming consumer protection so you never have to put harmful substances in your body again.

Credible

We speak with honesty and accuracy, grounded in research, science, and transparency. Our words reflect our commitment to integrity.

  • Use plain, factual, and data-informed language.
  • Acknowledge uncertainty or limitations openly.
  • Avoid exaggeration and speculation.
Do

We use AI to analyze billions of data points and identify early signs of potentially harmful products.

Don't

We harness cutting-edge AI capable of processing billions of data points with unparalleled precision, and we detect the earliest traces of products that may endanger consumers.

Approachable

We translate science into plain language and real-world terms so people can understand what it means for them.

  • Break information into small, digestible steps or statements.
  • Define unfamiliar terms the first time they appear.
  • Connect our findings to real-world impact.
Do

Hair dye use has been linked to a higher risk of bladder and breast cancer.

Don't

Chronic exposure to hair dye compounds is associated with increased oncogenic risk.

This, But Not That

Use this section to clarify the boundaries of Justpoint Inc.'s character traits. Understanding what we are and what we're not helps us select words to strike the right balance.

Justpoint Inc. is…

Aspirational but realistic

Do

When evidence becomes proof, we push for safer products, higher standards, and stronger regulations to better protect people.

Don't

We deliver safer products, higher standards, and stronger regulations that protect everyone, everywhere.

Cutting-edge but not futuristic

Do

We use science and technology to turn information into action.

Don't

Experience the future of consumer protection, powered by AI.

Intellectual but not unapproachable

Do

Studies show a potential link between long-term exposure and risk.

Don't

Our meta-analysis confirms a statistically significant causal pathway.

Trustworthy but not self-righteous

Do

With AI and science, we detect dangerous products to stop the harm they cause.

Don't

Others ignore the facts. We're the ones exposing them.

Inspiring but not dramatic

Do

It started with one family's story. Now, it's our shared mission.

Don't

What started as a personal mission has become our shared fight against system negligence — and the stakes are higher than ever.

Justpoint PLLC Voice

⚠️ Always double-check your copy with the Legal team.

Professional

We speak with authority, precision, and respect.

  • Stay focused on facts, timelines, and what claimants can expect.
  • Keep explanations clear and structured.
  • Avoid vague statements, casual language, and emojis.
Do

We're available to answer any questions you might have. Chat directly with a team member, available daily from 8 am to 11 pm EST.

Don't

Got questions? We've got answers! Let's chat.

Supportive

We strive for empathy and clarity. Our communication recognizes difficult experiences while remaining grounded in facts.

  • Avoid clichés, assumptions, and dramatic tones.
  • Acknowledge the reality of people's experiences.
  • Use plain language to reduce cognitive load.
Do
Some of these questions may feel personal or bring up difficult memories.

Please be assured that everything you share is kept confidential within our team and used only to evaluate your case.

Don't
We understand that sharing your story is incredibly painful.

Please be assured that the data you provide will be maintained in strict confidence by our team and used only for the evaluation of your case.

Trustworthy

We earn trust through transparency, consistency, and honesty. We avoid overpromising and focus on helping claimants set realistic expectations.

  • Don't pressure or influence people's decisions.
  • Explain processes upfront and acknowledge limitations (like timelines or effort).
  • Use words that signal choice and gather consent from people.
Do
Explore your legal options today.

If you've been impacted, we'll review your case at no cost.

Don't
Take back control of your health.

Evaluation is free and easy!

This But Not That

Use this section to clarify the boundaries of Justpoint PLLC's character traits. Understanding what we are and what we're not helps us select words to strike the right balance.

Justpoint PLLC is…

Straightforward but not cold

Do

We've reviewed your information, and at this time, we're unable to move forward.

Don't

You don't qualify.

Encouraging but not pushy

Do

When you're ready to take the next step, we'll be here to guide you through it.

Don't

Act now before it's too late to file your case.

Confident but not arrogant

Do

Our experienced team has guided clients through some of the most challenging mass tort cases and achieved proven outcomes.

Don't

Justpoint offers the best legal representation available. Our experts are the most qualified in the field.

Direct but not sensationalist

Do

Diagnosed with meningioma after taking Depo-Provera?

Don't

DEPO-PROVERA ALERT! Is your birth control causing BRAIN TUMORS?

Reliable but not stiff

Do

We'll update you regularly so you always know what's the current state of the process.

Don't

Please await further notification regarding your legal status.
